title: Martin Oxford Scholarship Online Security Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the security layers and data flow for a protected academic scholarship platform, emphasizing access control, data protection, and network security.
relationships: User accesses the Web Application Portal through a secure HTTPS connection protected by the Network Firewall
Web Application Portal requests credentials from the User and sends them to the Authentication Server for verification
Upon successful authentication, the Web Application Portal queries the encrypted Scholarship Database for application data and status
Administrators manage applications and users via a separate, secured Administrative Interface that also connects to the database
